<!--
Thanks for the PR. Keep changes scoped — if this introduces a new
pillar-level concept or breaks the public API, please open an issue
first so we can talk shape before code.
-->

## What

One-line summary of the change.

## Why

The motivation. Bug? Behavior gap between manifest and runtime? Performance?
If there's an issue number, link it (`Fixes #123`).

## Test plan

- [ ] `npm test` (737+ tests pass)
- [ ] `npm run demo` (4-stage demo chain completes)
- [ ] If touching a pillar: explain how the existing tests cover the new behavior, or what tests were added.
